value.description:
Scope of work includes demolition and reconstruction of a rear addition to the existing house and complete renovation of the interior along with renovation of rear yard with new detached garage.  The house will be used as a primary residence. 
Existing house square feet = 3,984 SF.  Renovated house square feet == 4,340 SF

All setbacks will be set by the Historic commission.

To construct a 10' X 16' (160 SF) attached uncovered deck to the rear of existing single family residence. Minimum side setback is 5' ft. minimum rear setback is 10' ft. Not to be constructed over any easements. 

THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT HEREBY CERTIFIES THAT ALL CONSTRUCTION AND DEMOLITION WASTE WILL BE DISPOSED IN AN APPROVED LANDFILL. THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT ALSO CERTIFIES THAT NO CONSTRUCTION OR DEMOLITION WASTE SHALL BE STORED ON THE PROPERTY IN VIOLATION OF ANY PROVISIONS OF THE METROPOLITAN CODE.

FOR EVERY 50 FEET OF SITE FRONTAGE, A DOUBLE-SIDED SIGN 24” X 36” IN SIZE MUST BE POSTED IN ENGLISH AND SPANISH THAT CONTAINS THE INFORMATION REQUIRED BY ORDINANCE NO. 2017-835. NO MORE THAN THREE SIGNS ARE REQUIRED.

To construct 12'x15' pergola addition off rear of existing single family residence. To be constructed over existing 12'x15' open deck, to include staircase to new 23'x14' concrete patio. 5’ minimum side setback, 20’ minimum rear setback. No second kitchen, to remain single family residence. Not to build over or obstruct easements.

To construct a two-story 4,400 sq ft addition to an existing 1,600 sq ft single-family dwelling. Total interior demolition and renovation to the existing structure. Not to be constructed over or obstruct any easements. Not to add a second kitchen dwelling unit. To be maintained as a single-family dwelling. Subject to Contextual Overlay District design guidelines (Section 17.36.470).  62.17' minimum  street setback, 5' side and 20' rear setbacks. Maximum permitted structure height: 33.75'. Maximum permitted principal building coverage: 3,579' sq ft. Proposed principal building coverage: 3,098'. 481 sq ft remaining.

THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT HEREBY CERTIFIES THAT ALL CONSTRUCTION AND DEMOLITION WASTE WILL BE DISPOSED IN AN APPROVED LANDFILL. THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT ALSO CERTIFIES THAT NO CONSTRUCTION OR DEMOLITION WASTE SHALL BE STORED ON PROPERTY IN VIOLATION OF ANY PROVISIONS OF THE METROPOLITAN CODE.

FOR EVERY 50 FEET OF SITE FRONTAGE, A DOUBLE-SIDED SIGN 24” X 36” IN SIZE MUST BE POSTED IN ENGLISH AND SPANISH THAT CONTAINS THE INFORMATION REQUIRED BY ORDINANCE NO. 2017-835. NO MORE THAN THREE SIGNS ARE REQUIRED.

To demolish existing deck and construct a new 19.5' X 18' covered/screened porch with stairs. Not to be constructed over or obstruct any easements. Setbacks as approved by the Historic Zoning Commission (HZC). HZC Permit #2025083344. See revisions approved by HZC.

THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT HEREBY CERTIFIES THAT ALL CONSTRUCTION AND DEMOLITION WASTE WILL BE DISPOSED IN AN APPROVED LANDFILL. THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT ALSO CERTIFIES THAT NO CONSTRUCTION OR DEMOLITION WASTE SHALL BE STORED ON PROPERTY IN VIOLATION OF ANY PROVISIONS OF THE METROPOLITAN CODE.

value.description: Interior renovations, constructing living space on second floor and addition to rear of four bed three bath residence. RS5 Zoning with SP Overlay.  maximum allowed height for eaves is 24'.  remains single family residence.  only one kitchen allowed in residence.  for every 50' site frontage, a 24" x 36" d/f sign must be placed in English and Spanish with information in regards to metro council bill 2017-835.

Interior demolition and renovation of an existing single-family dwelling to renovate the kitchen area, create a home office/flex room, enlarge the great room and primary bedrooms (moving the primary bathroom). No work proposed in walk out basement. To construct additions off the main floor for the great room and primary bedroom adding 378 conditioned sq ft. Demo existing front porch and reconstruct (no increase in size), keeping the same size and adding an uncovered deck and stairs located in the back yard. To also construct a fireplace off the great room. Maintaining the existing 5 bedroom/3 bath dwelling and adding a flex room/home office. Not adding second kitchen or a dwelling unit, to be maintained as a single-family dwelling. Minimum 30' platted street, 10' side and 20' rear setbacks.
